app.title: HOKOKU AI
dash.sub.self: Upload your own medical report and our AI will explain it simply.
dash.sub.other: Upload a report for your managed patient and we will translate it for you.
dash.howto.title: How to upload your report
dash.howto.1: Take a clear photo of your report paper with your phone
dash.howto.2: Make sure the writing is visible and the photo is not blurry
dash.howto.3: Tap the big upload button below and select your photo or PDF
dash.howto.4: Wait a few seconds — we will read and explain it for you!
dash.dragdrop: Drag & drop or click to upload
dash.uploadInst:
Upload a photo of the report (JPG / PNG)
or a PDF file from your phone or computer
dash.wait: Please wait, this may take a few seconds…
dash.fallback.title: 📝 Cannot upload a photo? Type the key sentence from your report
dash.result.title: What Your Report Says
dash.disc: ⚠️ Important Note: This tool helps explain medical reports in simple language. It is NOT a doctor and does NOT diagnose any disease. Please always show your report to a qualified doctor before making any health decisions.
guardian.trackAct: Track your active medicines and keep your family updated.
guardian.oviewAll: Overview of all family members and patients you are watching over.
login.err.req: Please fill in all required fields.
login.err.pass: Password must be at least 6 characters.
login.err.role: Please select at least one role.
login.err.name: Please enter your full name.
login.err.exists: An account with this email already exists. Please log in.
login.err.invalid: Incorrect email or password. Try again.
login.hero.title: Your health,\nexplained simply.
login.hero.desc: Upload medical reports, track medicines, and keep your family informed — all in one secure, AI-powered platform.
login.sub.in: Sign in to your HOKOKU AI account to continue.
login.sub.up: Join HOKOKU AI and take control of your health.
login.who: Who are you logging in as?
login.dual.desc: You will track your own health and also monitor another person as their Guardian.
login.name: Full Name
reports.mySub: A collection of your past interpreted reports and health trends.
reports.managedSub: Historical reports for the patients you monitor.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your personal details, AI preferences, and guardian alerts.
settings.critAlertsDesc: Automatically notify your guardian if AI detects Level 3 (Critical) indicators
settings.wklySummDesc: Receive a weekly report of your health progress and medicine adherence
settings.guardSyncDesc: Allow your linked guardian to view your medical report history
settings.privacyP1: HOKOKU AI is a self-help health assistant. It helps you understand medical terminology but does not provide a medical diagnosis. Always consult with a qualified doctor for clinical decisions.
experts.title: Medical Experts & Suggestions
experts.subtitle: Connect with verified specialists to discuss your reports and get professional health suggestions.
experts.readyToDiscuss: Ready to discuss your AI interpretation?
experts.readyDesc: Our experts are trained to use HOKOKU AI interpretations to help provide faster, clearer health advice during your session.
